option_line: bffi_mpBuyer4:"The Knight has a point, Menes. I couldn't make an offer without verification."
original: The Knight has a point, Menes. I couldn't make an offer without verification.
translated: Le Chevalier n'a pas tort, Menes. Je ne pourrais pas faire d'offre sans vérification.

original:
Menes laugh is more than a little strained.

"Now now, captain, I have not said I was offering the glove for any kind of sale. And," he glances back at Bornanew, "a lesser man than I might take offense at your implications, sir. My source has impeccable standards, and I assure you the provenance of the piece is most distinguished."
translated:
Le rire de Menes est plus que légèrement crispé.

"Allons, allons, capitaine, je n'ai pas dit que je proposais le gant à la vente. Et," il jette un regard à Bornanew, "un homme moindre que moi pourrait s'offenser de vos insinuations, monsieur. Ma source a des standards irréprochables, et je vous assure que la provenance de la pièce est des plus distinguées."

option_line: bffi_mpBuyerVeracity:"Considering my offer, I require full confidence in the item."
original: Considering my offer, I require full confidence in the item.
translated: Vu mon offre, j'exige une confiance totale dans l'authenticité de l'objet.

option_line: bffi_mpBuyerCredits500k:"Let's discuss credits. Would a half-million open the question of a sale?"
original: Let's discuss credits. Would a half-million open the question of a sale?
translated: Parlons crédits. Est-ce qu'un demi-million ouvrirait la question d'une vente ?

option_line: bffi_mpBuyerCredits1m:"Let's not waste time. One million credits."
original: Let's not waste time. One million credits.
translated: Ne perdons pas de temps. Un million de crédits.

original:
"Veracity?" An annoyed look crosses Menes face.

"I have nothing to prove; the good name of Yaribay speaks for itself. Besides, we are not even discussing a sale."
translated:
"Véracité ?" Un air agacé traverse le visage de Menes.

"Je n'ai rien à prouver ; le bon nom des Yaribay parle de lui-même. D'ailleurs, nous ne discutons même pas d'une vente."

original: "One million credits." Menes can't help but allow a glowing smile to break across his face.
translated: "Un million de crédits." Menes ne peut s'empêcher de laisser un sourire radieux illuminer son visage.

original:
He scoffs. "What do you take me for, a simpleton Luddie farmer from Chalcedon?"

His eyes dart at Bornanew to see if this one landed. $global.jethroName appears to be looking toward another display in one of the side-rooms.

Menes turns back to you, his brow furrowed at Bornanew's impassiveness. "Come now, captain, I was told you're a serious spacer. Ruthless in battle and savvy in trade. Was I so misinformed?"
translated:
Il ricane. "Pour qui me prenez-vous, un simple fermier luddique de Chalcedon ?"

Ses yeux se tournent vers Bornanew pour voir si la pique a fait mouche. $global.jethroName semble regarder une autre vitrine dans l'une des pièces adjacentes.

Menes se retourne vers vous, le front plissé face à l'impassibilité de Bornanew. "Allons, capitaine, on m'a dit que vous étiez un spacien sérieux. Impitoyable au combat et avisé en affaires. Aurais-je été si mal informé ?"

original: Something shines in Menes' eyes. "I speak hypothetically, of course," he says, "but I wouldn't begin to think of a sale for anything less than a million credits."
translated: Quelque chose brille dans les yeux de Menes. "Je parle hypothétiquement, bien sûr," dit-il, "mais je ne commencerais même pas à envisager une vente pour moins d'un million de crédits."

option_line: bffi_mpBuyerCredits1m:"I'll consider a million. But only if it's real."
original: I'll consider a million. But only if it's real.
translated: J'envisagerai un million. Mais seulement si c'est authentique.
